title: Margherita Pizza
description: A classic Italian pizza featuring a perfectly baked crust topped with simple, fresh ingredients: tomato sauce, mozzarella cheese, and fresh basil.
ingredients: Pinch of salt and black pepper
steps: Preheat oven to 250°C (480°F) or highest setting.
Stretch the pizza dough on a floured surface.
Spread an even layer of pizza sauce over the dough.
Distribute mozzarella slices evenly and drizzle with olive oil.
Bake for 10-12 minutes until crust is golden. Top with fresh basil before serving.

cookingTips: For the best Margherita Pizza, always use fresh, high-quality ingredients.
Do not rush the cooking process; allow the flavors to meld naturally.
Adjust the spices according to your personal taste preference.

faq.question: Can I make Margherita Pizza ahead of time?
faq.answer: Yes, you can prepare the ingredients in advance, but it's best served fresh.

faq.question: How do I store the leftovers?
faq.answer: Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.

faq.question: Can I freeze this dish?
faq.answer: It is generally not recommended to freeze this as it may alter the texture.
